The '''''Goya''''' was a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] used by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Transport ''Goya'' reloaded warheads for essential [[TIE starfighter]]s attacking [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Akaga]]'' at the [[Treachery at Ottega]].

{{Ship-stub}}
